title: Expose task and issue lifecycle operations through all surfaces
description: Surface the new core mutations without duplicating lifecycle logic. Add scriptable CLI commands for task and issue creation, updates, transitions, reopen, and close; add equivalent MCP tools and dashboard API/UI actions; and ensure every layer returns the same CommandResult semantics and canonical records.
acceptance: CLI provides task create, task update, task set-status, and task reopen with JSON output and coded diagnostics.
CLI provides issue list, show, create, update, and close with JSON output and coded diagnostics.
MCP and dashboard expose equivalent operations as thin wrappers over core functions.
Dashboard task and issue details display declared status, derived readiness/blockers, rich issue context, and actionable lifecycle controls.
Parity tests show equivalent canonical JSON, events, timestamps, and diagnostic codes for the same operation through CLI, MCP, and dashboard.
No CLI, MCP, dashboard route, or client writes canonical JSON directly.
notes: Although this task uses scope-cli as its primary coordination scope, it intentionally spans all thin surfaces. Coordinate dashboard files before claiming if another dashboard task is active.
